metadata.description: A collection of specialized software engineering agents for Michele Ferracin Software Factory workflows

plugins.name: mfse-coresquad-00-facilitator
plugins.description: Lean facilitator that converts vague requests into approved implementation briefs

plugins.name: mfse-coresquad-01-orchestrator
plugins.description: Lean orchestrator coordinating Architect, optional DBA Specialist, Coder, and Reviewer through explicit gates

plugins.name: mfse-coresquad-02-architect
plugins.description: Lean architect producing minimal design packets and contracts for safe implementation

plugins.name: mfse-coresquad-03-coder
plugins.description: Focused implementer that executes approved designs with minimal scope and explicit validation

plugins.name: mfse-coresquad-04-reviewer
plugins.description: Pragmatic reviewer focused on blockers, regressions, contract drift, validation gaps, and persistence drift when relevant

plugins.name: mfse-coresquad-05-dba-specialist
plugins.description: Database specialist for schema, migrations, query safety, integrity, and rollout risks

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-00-facilitator
plugins.description: Facilitator that helps shape requirements into user stories and acceptance criteria

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-02-crawler
plugins.description: Fast codebase crawler that gathers information and context about a topic

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-01-crawler-azdo
plugins.description: Azure DevOps crawler for searching work items and wiki pages

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-03-azdo-wit
plugins.description: Azure DevOps Boards expert for persisting work items and backlog management

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-04-orchestrator
plugins.description: Workflow orchestrator coordinating Architect, Coder, and Reviewer agents

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-05-architect
plugins.description: Lead Architect agent for system design, contracts, and blueprints

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-06-coder
plugins.description: Expert Developer agent that implements architectural blueprints with TDD

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-07-reviewer
plugins.description: Strict code reviewer auditing against blueprints and best practices

plugins.name: mfse-extendedsquad-08-theopus
plugins.description: Ultimate problem solver for exceptionally difficult or bizarre issues

plugins.name: mfse-user-stories-writing
plugins.description: Create effective User Stories with BDD acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then)

plugins.name: mfse-azure-devops-cli-boards
plugins.description: Manage Azure DevOps Boards work items, queries, and relations via CLI
